items.example: This tablet is as fast as the new model.
The bicycle is not as fast as a car, but it's healthier.
The new smartphone is too expensive for most students.
Is the internet connection fast enough for video calls?
Life is a lot easier now than it was a hundred years ago.
E-books are slightly cheaper than printed books.
What do you think is the best invention of the last century?
What could be better than sitting in the sun with a good book?
